ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the transcript */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Feature type (e.g., mRNA, lnc_RNA) */,
  "biotype" TEXT /* Biotypes (e.g., protein_coding, processed_transcript) */,
  "assembly_id" TEXT /* ID of the genome assembly that the transcript belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Nucleotide sequence of the transcript */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transcript */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transcript */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcript was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transcript */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcript was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_chromosome FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_biotype FOREIGN KEY ("biotype") REFERENCES biotypes ("biotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_feature_type FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol (e.g., HGNC symbol) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the gene */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the gene */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_gene_relationships" (
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene associated with the transcript */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the transcript and gene (e.g., transcribed_from) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id", "gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tss_distances" (
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript */,
  "distance_to_tss" INTEGER /* Distance to the transcription start site */,
  "tss_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcription start site */,
  "tss_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcription start site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the chromosome */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the chromosome was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the chromosome */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the chromosome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biotypes" (
  "biotype_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each biotype */,
  "biotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the biotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the biotype */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the biotype */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the biotype was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the biotype */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the biotype was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature type */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the feature type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature type was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the feature type */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution that the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcript was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)
